basic-search-server._comment: MCP server from 01_mcp/server.py — run: python 01_mcp/server.py --transport http

agents-server._comment: MCP server from 02_agents/server.py — run: python 02_agents/server.py --transport http

drawio._comment: Draw.io MCP — replace <REPO_ROOT> with the absolute path to this repository (e.g. /Users/you/UDEM_AI_MCP_AGENTS). Dependencies must be installed first: cd dep/drawio-mcp/mcp-tool-server && npm install
